current_judgment: viewer, control-room, citation/source-meta, and served-viewer generation no longer trust `active_manifest.json` alone; they now converge on one shared official runtime registry built from `active_manifest + source_manifest + playbook_documents`.
key_evidence: `runtime_catalog_registry.py` now merges active markdown runtime, approved source manifest metadata, and materialized playbook documents into one official runtime registry.

`presenters.py` now falls back to the shared registry when a book is missing from the source manifest, so derived docs paths keep official runtime truth metadata instead of degrading to empty metadata.

`source_books.py` now resolves preferred viewer paths and chat link truth payloads from the shared registry, so `/docs/...` official runtime links and `/playbooks/wiki-runtime/active/...` links carry the same truth boundary.
`data_control_room.py` now builds `approved_wiki_runtime_books` from the shared registry instead of only `active_manifest.json`.

`materialize_active_runtime_viewers.py` now serves `/docs/ocp/...` viewers for the full official runtime registry and still serves the `29` active markdown viewers under `/playbooks/wiki-runtime/active/...`.
validation_results: .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests/test_runtime_catalog_registry.py tests/test_app_viewers.py tests/test_app_data_control_room.py -q -> 35 passed, 1 warning, 10 subtests passed

.\scripts\codex_python.ps1 scripts\materialize_active_runtime_viewers.py "scripts/materialize_active_runtime_viewers.py,artifacts/runtime/served_viewers,reports/build_logs/active_runtime_viewer_serving_report.json" ".\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests/test_runtime_catalog_registry.py tests/test_app_viewers.py tests/test_app_data_control_room.py -q" -> docs_materialized_count=174, active_runtime_materialized_count=29
next_action: the remaining legacy knot is governance, not surface routing: `activate_wiki_runtime_group.py` and `runtime_truth_freeze.py` still frame `active_manifest.json` as the active snapshot owner. The next packet should move activation/audit contracts onto the shared registry so the build pipeline and evidence layer stop speaking a different truth from the product surfaces.
